summary: The EU regulator has issued an update concerning new Anti-Money Laundering (AML) reporting thresholds. The revised limit is now €5,000 and this change is effective immediately. It is essential for the compliance team to update internal policies to align with this new regulation. Additionally, the finance department should be informed to adjust customer verification procedures accordingly.

tasks.description: Update internal policies to align with the new Anti-Money Laundering reporting thresholds
